summary: Frontend testing of KiloLab public pages. All requested features verified: Landing page loads correctly, Login page renders without errors, Language switching (FR/EN) works perfectly, Navigation to /tarifs, /faq, /contact works, Mobile hamburger menu opens and shows all items including language selector, Vite build succeeds without errors.

minor.issue: 403 error on some resources (expected - invalid API key in preview env)

passed_tests: Landing page loads correctly with French text by default
Navbar with all navigation links visible
Hero section with 'Libérez votre temps' text
Language selector (flag dropdown) visible in navbar
Language switch FR -> EN works - text changes to 'Free up your time', 'Pricing', etc.
Language switch EN -> FR works - text changes back to French
Navigation to /tarifs works - shows Standard (3€/kg) and Premium (5€/kg) plans
Navigation to /faq works - shows FAQ accordion with categories (Service, Livraison, Paiement, Problèmes)
Navigation to /contact works - shows contact form with email, subject, message fields
Login page renders correctly with email/password fields and 'Se connecter' button
Mobile hamburger menu button visible on mobile viewport
Mobile menu opens and shows: Tarifs, Trouver un Washer, FAQ, Contact, Connexion, Devenir Washer, Commander
Mobile menu shows language selector buttons (🇫🇷 FR and 🇬🇧 EN)
Vite build succeeds without errors (built in 18.77s)
critical_code_review_comments: Good: LanguageSelector component properly uses i18n.changeLanguage() and persists to localStorage
Good: All navigation links have data-testid attributes for testing
Good: Mobile menu properly shows all navigation items and language selector
Good: Translations are complete for both FR and EN locales
Note: Supabase API returns 403 in preview environment (expected - API key issue)

success_rate.backend: N/A - Frontend only testing (Supabase API key invalid in preview)
success_rate.frontend: 100% - All public pages and features verified

test_credentials: No credentials needed - tested public pages only due to invalid Supabase API key
context_for_next_testing_agent: All public pages verified working: Landing, Login, Tarifs, FAQ, Contact. Language switching FR/EN works correctly on all pages. Mobile hamburger menu works with all navigation items and language selector. Vite build succeeds. Cannot test authenticated flows (dashboard, admin) due to invalid Supabase API key in preview environment - this is expected per main agent notes.
screenshots_taken: .screenshots/after_language_switch.png - Landing page after switching to English

landing_page.details: Loads correctly with hero section, navbar, and all content

login_page.details: Renders with email/password fields, login button, forgot password link

language_switching.details: FR/EN flags work correctly, text changes on all visible elements

navigation.details: /tarifs, /faq, /contact all load correctly with proper content

mobile_menu.details: Hamburger menu opens, shows all nav items and language selector

vite_build.details: Build succeeds in 18.77s, PWA service worker generated
